description: Canonical session-state layer. Renderers translate sections into per-project MEMORY.md and .forge_state/ surfaces reachable by every host. Append-first by default; active_tasks is the only rewriteable section. Secrets are denied at write time by the memory-archivist skill. The bridge block defines host-local memory synchronization around canonical MEMORY.md.

sections.name: Build Commands
sections.description: Verified shell commands that work in this repo (test runners, lint, build, deploy).

sections.name: Project Quirks
sections.description: Non-obvious behaviors, traps, host-specific or environment-specific gotchas.

sections.name: Active Tasks
sections.description: Short-lived in-flight work; rewriteable as state changes. The only non-append-only section.

sections.name: Recent Decisions
sections.description: Choices made this session that should propagate to other hosts but are not yet doctrine.

sections.name: Known Failures
sections.description: Current blockers, host quirks, reproducer notes, or workarounds awaiting promotion to LESSONS_LEARNED.md.
